Position Calculator OKX

Presets

Trading Instrument

Account & Risk Parameters

Maximum dollar loss you're willing to accept on this trade. Fees are deducted from this budget first.

Stop-Loss Distance Override

Define your SL distance as a percentage of entry price. The implied risk is calculated from this value.

Position Size Override

Specify exact position size in contract units. Leverage and risk are derived from this.

Trade Setup

0.10%

Maker = limit order (0.02%). Taker = market order (0.05%). Based on OKX standard futures rates.

Take-Profit Targets Multi

▲
Total: 100%  ·  1 target

Risk Allocation

Risk Amount—
Implied Risk %—
Fee Cost (round-trip)—
Price Risk Budget—

SL Distance (%)—
SL Distance ($)—
SL Price—
Net Loss if SL Hit—

Take-Profit Details

TP Price—
Avg TP Price—
TP Distance—

Position & Liquidation

Position Notional—
Position Size (units)—
Est. Liquidation Price—
Maintenance Margin—
Max Rec. Leverage—

Funding Estimate

Est. Funding / 8h—

Per-Target Breakdown

Liquidation price is estimated using OKX tiered maintenance margin for isolated positions. Always verify the exact figure on the exchange before opening a trade. Funding payments are estimated at a 0.01% rate per 8-hour settlement.
